summary: Iteration 87: Sidebar navigation restructure and Audit Logs page changes fully tested. All features working correctly - System menu with Sys Config/Audit Logs, Admin Config with Reports, Database removed, Audit Logs page shows only activity log with default 'details' view, Reports page works as standalone.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Sidebar navigation restructure complete. System menu contains Sys Config (links to /settings), Audit Logs (links to /admin/audit-log), and Commission (only for super_admin). Admin Config contains User Management, Operator Management, Revenue (admin only), Validation, and Reports. Database page completely removed. Audit Logs page shows only activity log with default 'details' view - no Reports tab. Reports page at /admin/reports works as standalone page with search, filters, and report cards.
